questionHtml:
Consider the case where a=2 and b=1. On the same set of axes, sketch the curves y2=16-8x and y2=4+4x. On your sketch, clearly label each curve and any x-intercepts.

Note: You are not required to find the coordinates of any points of intersection of the two curves.
markschemeHtml:
two parabolic shaped curves with approximately correct shape/position (e.g. two intersection points, in first and fourth quadrant)                    A1A1

x-intercepts -1 and 2.                    A1

[3 marks]
